---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working as expected
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run `sfdoc ...` with ...
2. See error / unexpected behaviour

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened (include error messages or output if relevant).

## Environment

- **sfdoc version:** (e.g. `sfdoc --version`)
- **OS:** (e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04)
- **Rust version:** (e.g. `rustc --version`)
- **Provider:** (e.g. gemini, groq, ollama)

## Additional context

Any other details, logs, or screenshots.
